$comment: Venue aliases — fold variant names into a canonical name at ingest time. Add an entry when you see the same physical venue showing up under different strings (e.g. TCAN vs. 'The Center for Arts in Natick').

venues.fullName: The Center for Arts in Natick
aliases: The Center for Arts in Natick
